steps.title: Translate the total limit
steps.content:
No more than $188$ total flowers means the sum of lilies and daisies is at most $188$:
$$
l+d\le 188
$$

steps.title: Translate the lily limit
steps.content:
Lilies being at most four times daisies means
$$
l\le 4d
$$

steps.title: Match both inequalities
steps.content: The system must contain both $l+d\le 188$ and $l\le 4d$. The answer is D.
